title: Fabric Boosted
description: Awesome Performace and many Quality of Life Mods
body:
[![https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3127](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dOLVvHgi/images/34bb4b86b09bc3882d7e3fd2069ee13a21d84387.png)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3127) ![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aca96ad03428b4cccfa5775f3b20e0c8a3818d5f.png) ### Combination of great performance, many quality of life mods and almost all optifine features

## 📚Versions 🟢 Release - Stable Versions with all listed mods
🟠 Beta - Unstable Versions with some missing mods
🔴 Alpha - Test Builds with many missing mods
| MC Version| Fabric Boosted Version|Stage| |---------------------|:---------------------:|:---------------------:| |26.2|3.3.0-Alpha1|🔴 Alpha| |26.1.2|3.2.1|🟢 Release| |1.21.11|2.7.6|🟢 Release| ## 🔥**Performace** >Benchmark was made on [GamerPotion's FPS Tester](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/worlds/gamerpotions-fps-test) with build-in config ![Benchmark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dOLVvHgi/images/8526be506a50a4027ec3f2702218cb597ed278ae.png) ## ⚠️ Final Versions
26.1.x 26.1.1 - 3.1.0-Alpha2
26.1 - 3.0.0-Alpha4
1.21.x 1.21.10 - 2.6.3
1.21.8 - 2.5.4
1.21.5 - 2.4.0
1.21.4 - 2.3.4
1.21.3 - 2.2.0-Beta3
1.21.1 - 2.1.16
1.21 - 2.0.10
1.20.x 1.20.6 - 1.3.15
1.20.4 - 1.2.12
1.20.2 - 1.1.6
1.20.1 - 1.0.19
## ❓FAQ > Q: What is so special about Fabric Boosted?
A: Fabric Boosted provides great performance and many QoL features which makes your gameplay a lot easier.
> Q: My game crashed what should I do?
A: Join [Discord](https://discord.gg/uaX8D5jQp2) and write about it on support channel. ## 🧾**Mod List 26.1.2**
🚀Performance Mods | Mod Name | Desription| |---------------------|:---------------------:| | **Sodium** | Main performance mod | | **Sodium Extra** | More settings to Sodium| | **Lithium** | Optimization to game physics, mob AI| | **FerriteCore** | Reduces RAM usage | | **Entity Culling** | Stops rendering invisible entities | | **More Culling** | Stops rendering invisible things | | **ImmediatelyFast** | Optimizes rendering various things | | **Nvidium** | Provides Nvidia rendering engine | | **Krypton** | Optimizes networking stack| | **ModernFix** |Improves performance, reduces memory usage, and fixes many bugs| | **Very Many Players** |Improves game performance at high playercounts| | **Concurrent Chunk Management Engine** |Improves chunk performance| | **Fast Noise** |Optimizes world generation performance| | **BadOptimizations** |Collection of mostly micro optimizations| | **Better Block Entities** |Improves block entity rendering| | **ScalableLux** |Improves the performance of light updates|
💡Optifine Features Mods | Mod Name | Desription| |---------------------|:---------------------:| |**Continuity** | Connected textures | |**Capes** | OptiFine capes| |**Zoomify** | Zoom feature | |**Entity Texture Features** | Custom & random entity textures| |**Animatica Refabricated** | Animated textures| |**Entity Model Features** | Custom Entity Models| |**LambDynamicLights** | Dynamic Lights system| |**OptiGUI** | Custom GUIs| |**Skyboxify** | Custom Skyboxes| |**Iris Shaders** |Shaders mod| |**Polytone** |Customize Map Color, Block Colors, Colormaps and Block Sounds, Biome Colors| |**FabricBetterGrass** |OptiFine's Fancy and Fast better grass|
💎Quality of Life Mods | Mod Name | Desription| |---------------------|:---------------------:| |**VoxelMap** |Minimap & Worldmap Mod | |**Shulker Box Tooltip** |Preview window of a shulker box contents| |**More Chat History** |Increases the maximum length of the chat history| |**Gamma Utils** |Allows to set brightness beyond default levels| |**Talk Balloons** |Adds bubbles above your head when you chat| |**Durability Viewer Updated** |Armor and Tool durability HUD| |**Ping View** |Displays each player's ping in the player list| |**Chat Heads** |Adds player heads next to chat messages| |**Remove Reloading Screen** |Makes resource packs load in the background| |**Essential** |Better screenshots, cosmetics & free server hosting| |**Just Enough Items** |Provides all item list and recipes| |**No Chat Reports** |Makes chat unreportable| |**FastQuit** |Saves world in background| |**Don't Clear Chat History** |Keeps chat history after leaving worlds or servers| |**Litematica** |Schematic mod| |**Bobby** |Allow render distances greater than server's set| |**Health Indicator TXF** |Damage Indicator| |**EpicForceCloseLoadingScreen** |Instantly closes loading terrain screen| |**Smooth Skies** |Smooths out the skybox colors on far render distances|
⚙️Utility Mods | Mod Name | Desription| |---------------------|:---------------------:| |**Mod Menu** |Adds a mod menu to view the list of mods| |**Puzzle** |GUI to configure OptiFine alternatives.| |**Reese's Sodium Options** |Better look of Sodium options| |**Spark** |Performance profiler for Minecraft clients| |**Not Enough Crashes** |After crash gives a way to keep playing | |**Auth Me** |Authenticate yourself and re-validate your session| |**Respackopts** |Config menus for resource packs| |**CraftPresence** |Discord RPC mod| |**Fast IP Ping** |Speeds up server pinging in menu| |**Crash Assistant** |Shows a GUI after Minecraft crashes| |**Main Menu Credits** |Adds information to the user's title screen| |**Debugify** |Fixes minecraft bugs found on the bug tracker| |**MixinTrace** |Adds a list of mixins in the stack trace to crash reports|
📚Libraries | Mod Name | |---------------------| |**Fabric API**| |**Fabric Language Kotlin**| |**Cloth Config API**| |**YetAnotherConfigLib**| |**MaliLib**| |**UniLib**| |**LibJF**|
